description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CPP CI that runs on every pull request, excluding changes to markdown files and the Dockerfile. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels any in-progress workflow for the same pull request and allows concurrent runs for different commits. It should have two jobs, build_ubuntu and build_windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest and windows-2022) and building with different configurations (Debug and Release). For each job, install dependencies, check out the repository with submodules, build the project with cmake, run unit tests, and perform additional tests (memory leak test on ubuntu and no additional test on windows).
